tasks.description: Define and export the new AppSpec runtime core types, including elements, expressions, actions, repeat, validation, watchers, and store contracts.
steps: Verify all work for this task stays on the geoquant/streaming-ui branch.
Verify AppSpec, AppElement, expression, action, repeat, validation, watcher, and store types are defined under the new app runtime core.
Verify the new core types are exported from the Kumo package entrypoints needed by runtime consumers.
Verify legacy UITree typing is either preserved through a compatibility alias or adapted through a migration boundary without breaking experimental consumers.

tasks.description: Implement the shared expression resolver, app store, and sequential action engine that powers bindings, visibility, confirm text, and built-in state and list mutations.
steps: Verify all work for this task stays on the geoquant/streaming-ui branch.
Verify props, visibility, action params, and confirm text resolve against the same runtime context.
Verify bound inputs write through the app store instead of the transient runtime value store.
Verify event maps can execute chained actions sequentially against the latest store snapshot.
Verify built-in state, list, and form actions mutate the app store correctly.

tasks.description: Add repeat rendering, field and form validation, and state watchers as first-class runtime semantics.
steps: Verify all work for this task stays on the geoquant/streaming-ui branch.
Verify repeated children render from array state without duplicating the base spec.
Verify repeat-scoped bindings can read and write item fields.
Verify field validation runs on declared change, blur, and submit modes.
Verify watcher-triggered actions run only after real state changes and stop on cycle protection.

tasks.description: Upgrade the patch engine and normalization boundary so the runtime can process full AppSpec documents, nested authoring input, and all RFC 6902 operations.
steps: Verify all work for this task stays on the geoquant/streaming-ui branch.
Verify add, remove, replace, move, copy, and test are all supported in core RFC 6902 tests.
Verify patches can target both AppSpec elements and AppSpec state paths.
Verify nested authoring input can be flattened into the runtime AppSpec shape.
Verify repair and normalization happen before render instead of only inside the renderer.

tasks.description: Package the React app runtime adapters, including useUIStream and useChatUI, so streamed app sessions and mixed text plus UI flows are reusable.
steps: Verify all work for this task stays on the geoquant/streaming-ui branch.
Verify one hook instance can drive a full streamed app session end to end.
Verify mixed text and UI stream parts accumulate correctly during a turn.
Verify apps can intercept runtime effects without forking hook internals.
Verify useUIStream handles patch-based and full-spec replacement flows.

tasks.description: Migrate the docs playground to the packaged runtime hooks and ship a task CRUD plus forms example that proves the new AppSpec model.
steps: Verify all work for this task stays on the geoquant/streaming-ui branch.
Verify PlaygroundPage no longer hand-rolls the core chat and runtime loop.
Verify Astro docs ship a working task CRUD plus forms example using AppSpec state, events, repeat, validation, and watchers.
Verify at least one follow-up chat turn updates both UI structure and app state correctly.
Verify no demo keeps a duplicated hand-rolled stream loop unless it is intentionally app-specific.

patterns: Hard rule: every implementation task and follow-on change stays on geoquant/streaming-ui.
Keep the flat keyed tree model and derive render snapshots from AppSpec plus store plus repeat scope.
Split pure runtime semantics under packages/kumo/src/app-runtime/core and React adapters under packages/kumo/src/app-runtime/react.
Use JSON Pointer as the single path language across bindings, actions, repeat, validation, watchers, and patches.
Maintain a small legacy adapter such as liftLegacyTree during migration so existing experimental demos keep working while moving to AppSpec.
nonGoals: Vue, Svelte, React Native, PDF, email, image, or video renderers
Arbitrary user-defined effect plugins beyond current host action extension points
Generated prompt changes beyond what is required to describe new spec fields
